name: CurrentAccount
description:
A bank account upon which the financial position of current account agreement is managed. 


Comment: A current account is also called a check account. It is often classified as a non-interest bearing account, as often the deposits do not yield interest.

Payment Services Directive (PSD) defines Current Account as a type of Payment Account. Payment Account means an account held in the name of one or more consumers that is used primarily for the execution of payment transactions. (PSD, 2007/64/EC)
